title: See Trump host Latin America leaders for the 'Shield of the Americas'
shortDescription: The 'Shield of the Americas,' President Trump's initiative for security against narcotics trafficking, brought Latin America leaders to Florida.

title: Iran war updates: Trump says Iran 'will be hit very hard'
shortDescription: Israel expanded its military operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon, unleashing airstrikes that killed scores.

title: Trump to receive remains of six Americans killed in Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is attending the dignified transfer of six Americans killed in a drone attack on a Kuwait base during fighting with Iran.

title: Trump may need billions for the Iran war. Congress stands in the way.
shortDescription: Capitol Hill is largely in the dark about what an emergency cash influx for the Iran war could look like. But Trump will have to go through Democrats.

title: Why are we at war with Iran? Trump has given many different reasons
shortDescription: President Donald Trump announced the attacks on Iran a week ago, and since then the objective list is growing. Why is the US at war with Iran?

title: Trump launched a ‘war on fraud.’ Here's why it’s a 50‑state problem
shortDescription: President Trump declared a 'war on fraud,' but experts say it's a battle that has eluded presidents for decades.

title: Cubastroika: Inside Trump's plan to win Cuba with American oil
shortDescription: Rather than force regime change, President Trump and Marco Rubio aim to win control of the island by deepening its economic dependence on the US.

title: Many Americans oppose Trump, U.S. military actions in Iran, new poll says
shortDescription: A majority of Americans oppose U.S. military actions in Iran and disapprove of Trump's handling of the conflict, a new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll shows.

title: Pregnant ER patients took less Tylenol after Trump's autism claims: study
shortDescription: After a September 2025 press conference in which President Trump told pregnant women not to use Tylenol, usage dropped in ERs, a new study found.

title: New Epstein files include Trump accusations
shortDescription: The DOJ released missing FBI interviews on the Jeffrey Epstein case that include accusations against President Donald Trump.

title: DOJ releases Epstein records with allegations against Trump
shortDescription: The release came after news reports about the documents being withheld. The Department of Justice said the documents had been “incorrectly coded."

title: Arkansas man charged with murder wins GOP primary in sheriff's election
shortDescription: Aaron Spencer was charged with second-degree murder in 2024 in the killing of a man accused of being his daughter's abuser.

title: Obama, Biden attend Jesse Jackson's funeral
shortDescription: Barack Obama, Joe Biden and Bill Clinton attended a memorial service to celebrate the life of civil rights activist Reverend Jesse Jackson in Chicago.

title: Beyond the Iran war: Trump's no-good, very-bad day on jobs, gas, Epstein
shortDescription: The White House was dealing not only with questions about the war but also a decline in jobs, a rise in gas prices and more Epstein files.

title: What has Trump said about running for a third term? He is limited to 2
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has talked about going for a third term as president, but the U.S. Constitution limits him to two terms. See his comments on it.

title: Trump demands Iran's 'unconditional surrender'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump demanded Iran's "unconditional surrender" in a social media post.

title: Obama, Biden, Clinton attend Jesse Jackson 'People's Celebration'
shortDescription: Former Presidents Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton attend the Chicago “People’s Celebration” homegoing for late Rev. Jesse Jackson in Chicago.

title: Voters head to polls on Tuesday to replace MTG in Georgia's 14th
shortDescription: Former congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene resigned in January, leading to a special election to replace her on March 10.

title: US-Iran war: Trump wants 'unconditional surrender' as gas prices rise
shortDescription: Trump's call for full capitulation came hours after Iran's president said mediation efforts to end the war were under way.
